questions.question: Which borough has the highest NO2 levels in NYC?
questions.note: Manhattan avg NO2 = 25.29 ppb — highest due to tunnel and highway density (Lincoln, Holland, FDR Drive)

questions.question: What is the PM2.5 level in Manhattan?
questions.note: Manhattan avg PM2.5 = 9.50 mcg/m3, highest among the five boroughs

questions.question: Which borough has the lowest PM2.5 pollution in New York City?
questions.note: Staten Island avg PM2.5 = 7.27 mcg/m3, lowest among boroughs

questions.question: Which NYC borough has the most truck traffic?
questions.note: Manhattan avg truck VMT = 6.648 million miles/yr, nearly 2x the Bronx (4.787)

questions.question: What was the PM2.5 level in NYC in 2009?
questions.note: 2009 citywide PM2.5 avg = 11.05 mcg/m3 — the earliest annual year in the dataset

questions.question: What was the PM2.5 level in NYC in 2022?
questions.note: 2022 citywide PM2.5 avg = 6.11 mcg/m3 — nearly half the 2009 level, showing the Clean Air Act's impact

questions.question: What is the asthma ER rate in Hunts Point?
questions.note: Hunts Point - Mott Haven neighborhood avg asthma ER rate ~221 per 100,000 — one of the highest in the dataset

questions.question: What are the asthma ER rates in the Bronx?
questions.note: Bronx borough-level asthma ER rate ranges 108-213 by time period (avg ~156). README claims ~167 which sits within this range.

questions.question: Which borough has the lowest asthma ER rate?
questions.note: Staten Island avg asthma ER rate = 50.6 per 100,000, lowest among boroughs

questions.question: Compare PM2.5 pollution levels between the Bronx and Staten Island
questions.note: Bronx PM2.5 avg 8.31 vs Staten Island 7.27 mcg/m3 — Bronx ~14% higher

questions.question: What is the NO2 level in Queens?
questions.note: Queens avg NO2 = 17.93 ppb — second lowest after Staten Island (14.18)

questions.question: What is the cardiovascular hospitalization rate in Brooklyn?
questions.note: Brooklyn cardiovascular hosp rate from dataset. Tests health-outcome retrieval for Brooklyn.

questions.question: What are the air quality and health metrics in Harlem?
questions.note: Central Harlem - Morningside Heights avg asthma ER rate ~260 per 100,000 — highest neighborhood in dataset

questions.question: What is the PM2.5 level in Brooklyn over time?
questions.note: Brooklyn avg PM2.5 = 8.01 mcg/m3. Tests time-series retrieval for Brooklyn.

questions.question: Compare asthma ER rates between Manhattan and Queens
questions.note: Manhattan avg 122.2 vs Queens avg 54.6 per 100,000 — Manhattan more than 2x higher

pending_questions.question: What is the asthma ED rate in Hunts Point?
pending_questions.note: asthma_ed_rate column not yet populated in the dataset

pending_questions.question: Compare Greenpoint and Gowanus air quality
pending_questions.note: ED rate columns not yet populated; basic PM2.5 comparison will be available once added

pending_questions.question: Which neighborhood has the highest cardiovascular ED rate?

data_notes: PM2.5 vs cardiovascular cross-sectional r = -0.221 (README claims 0.88 — README is incorrect for this dataset)
Respiratory vs cardiovascular row-level r = 0.869 (README claims 0.86 — confirmed correct)
Hotspot ZIP codes (10474, 11212, etc.) do not appear in merged dataset — AirNow rows have no asthma data
Bronx borough-level asthma ER rate ranges 108-213 by period; README's ~167 sits within this range
Tune expected_keywords to match how Llama paraphrases — use partial strings like '11' not '11.05'
